name: Gunpowder Gauntlet
description: Deals additional magical damage on the next attack with a cooldown of 10 seconds, and has a splash effect that deals 50% of the primary target's damage within a radius of 250 units.

effects.primary: The next attack deals 156 magical attack damage bonus to the primary target and additional 50% splash damage within 250 units. Cooldown: 10 seconds.
